body:
## Summary

- Add `--focus-uhr-reference-card-accessibility` routing to `scripts/validate-content.js`.
- Extend the UHR reference card accessibility rule set from 10 to 15 checks by validating the nested `SourceCitation` accessibility defaults used by the card.
- Add routing coverage so the UHR parity test uses the focused validator path instead of full content validation.

## Validation

- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-uhr-reference-card-accessibility`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-uhr-reference-card-accessibility-parity.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js --test-name-pattern "UHRReferenceCard|SourceCitation|focus-uhr-reference-card"`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false` with the existing repo `node_modules` temporarily linked into this isolated worktree
- `git diff --check`

## Note

A separate targeted run of `node --test scripts/content-production.test.js --test-name-pattern "content production|UHR|accessibility|uhrReferenceCard"` still fails before the UHR assertion on stale production-summary constants (`practiceFlowCasesValidated` expects 12 but current validation emits 6; `launchAdSuppressedRoutesValidated` expects 8 but current validation emits 14).
title: [codex] Focus UHR reference card accessibility validation
